name: Sand Cups (Jello Pudding)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the cold milk into a large bowl.
2. Add the Jello pudding mix and stir until well blended, about 1 to 2 minutes.
3. Let the mixture stand for 5 minutes.
4. Stir in the Cool whip topping and half of the crushed Vanilla wafers.
5. Place one tablespoon of crushed Vanilla wafers into each cup.
6. Fill each cup three-quarters full with the pudding mix.
7. Top with the remaining crushed Vanilla wafers.
8. Refrigerate for one hour.
9. Decorate with gummy bears and mini umbrellas or anything of your choice.
